benchmark.command: rch exec -- cargo bench -p fj-dispatch --bench dispatch_baseline -- vmap_eigh/batched_matrix_3x3 --noplot --sample-size 20 --warm-up-time 1 --measurement-time 3

baseline.code: pass76 pre-lever code path, manually restored with apply_patch for same-worker comparison

after.code: n=3 Eigh/Jacobi specialization with stable total_cmp sort network

isomorphism.scope: Only n == 3 Eigh/Jacobi dispatch changes; generic n != 3 path is unchanged.
isomorphism.pivot_order: Jacobi off-diagonal scan order remains (0,1), (0,2), (1,2), with strict greater-than replacement.
isomorphism.floating_point: Theta branch, atan expression, sin_cos, row rotations, diagonal recomputation, and zeroing semantics are preserved.
isomorphism.ordering: Eigenvalue ordering still uses total_cmp ascending; compare-swap uses is_lt so equal values keep stable old-column order.

validation: rch exec -- cargo test -p fj-dispatch test_batch_trace_eigh_multi -- --nocapture: 6 passed, including both golden SHA tests
rch exec -- cargo test -p fj-dispatch --all-targets: 256 unit tests, 55 integration tests, bench harness smoke passed
rch exec -- cargo check -p fj-dispatch --all-targets: passed
rch exec -- cargo clippy -p fj-dispatch --all-targets --no-deps -- -D warnings: passed
